title: Status
description: A datapack that adds a custom status to players which they can select.
body:
A datapack that adds a custom status next to player names.

Use the command
```
/trigger status
```
This will bring up a menu to choose your status. You can select between Livestreaming / Recordning / Neither and Do Not Disturb / Available

The status will display in tab as shown below

![A player list using the Status datapack. Right bar represents Do not disturb (Red) / Available (Green) and the left bar represents Live (Purple) / Recording (Red) / Neither (Gray)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d706c041445531ee73b09d94fcfe51b19f402729.png)

Datapack by Naetilus

Original idea by [Henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/mod/status)
